claims.summary: Recess and boredom are intentional autonomy modes rather than absence of useful work.
claims.disposition: verify the Recess posture and boredom/curiosity language remain explicit

claims.summary: A dense continuity and authority control plane can conflict with Recess permission even when no hard block fires.
claims.disposition: verify Recess density, divergence-buffer, and pressure-permission conflict diagnostics expose this without bypassing caps

claims.summary: Pressure, entropy, boredom, and action density should be compared across captured Recess intervals.
claims.disposition: route a bounded read-only artifact comparison

claims.summary: Recess should automatically widen porosity or action budgets when pressure rises.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live autonomy budgets and regulation
